transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Willowbrook Care Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Ferris. It's currently next Tuesday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your record?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see your appointment with Dr. Ferris next Tuesday at 10 AM. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Could we do sometime the following Thursday instead?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, Dr. Ferris has an opening that Thursday at 2:15 PM. Would that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I've moved your appointment to Thursday at 2:15 PM and canceled the original Tuesday slot. You'll get a text confirmation shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Marcus. Have a great day.
